problem.name: Severe Drought in Jihomoravský and Středočeský
problem.description: Prolonged drought is threatening agriculture, reducing crop yields and water supply. Farmers are protesting and citizens worry about food prices.

solutions.name: Invest in Irrigation Projects
solutions.description: Government invests heavily in new irrigation infrastructure to support farmers.

solutions.name: Provide Financial Aid Only
solutions.description: Distribute subsidies and financial support to affected farmers without infrastructure projects.

solutions.name: Ignore and Hope for Rain
solutions.description: Take no immediate action, hoping the drought will end naturally.

problem.name: EU Sanctions Pressure in Prague
problem.description: EU imposes sanctions related to international trade, putting pressure on the government in Prague to comply or negotiate exceptions.

solutions.name: Negotiate Exceptions
solutions.description: Diplomats work with the EU to reduce sanctions impact.

solutions.name: Comply Fully
solutions.description: Immediate full compliance with EU sanctions to avoid penalties.

solutions.name: Resist and Challenge
solutions.description: Government publicly challenges sanctions, risking diplomatic tension.

problem.name: Industrial Pollution in Moravskoslezský
problem.description: Air pollution from factories in Moravskoslezský is causing health concerns and protests in nearby communities.

solutions.name: Enforce Environmental Regulations
solutions.description: Impose strict limits and fines on factories emitting pollutants.

solutions.name: Provide Incentives for Clean Tech
solutions.description: Offer tax breaks and subsidies to factories that adopt cleaner technologies.

solutions.name: Take No Action
solutions.description: Avoid intervening, hoping the issue resolves naturally.

problem.name: Teacher Strike in Plzeňský
problem.description: Teachers in Plzeňský are striking over salary disputes, causing school closures and parental unrest.

solutions.name: Increase Teacher Salaries
solutions.description: Allocate additional funds to raise teacher pay, ending the strike.

solutions.name: Negotiate Partial Compromise
solutions.description: Offer moderate salary increase and improved conditions.

solutions.name: Refuse Demands
solutions.description: Keep budget unchanged, risking prolonged strike.

problem.name: Cyberattack on National Health System
problem.description: A cyberattack is crippling healthcare IT systems nationwide, causing delays in treatment and public panic.

solutions.name: Deploy Emergency IT Teams
solutions.description: Immediately send expert teams to recover systems and secure networks.

solutions.name: Invest in Long-Term Cybersecurity
solutions.description: Upgrade infrastructure to prevent future attacks.

solutions.name: Delay Action
solutions.description: Wait for external assistance, risking further damage.

problem.name: Floods in Jihočeský and Zlínský
problem.description: Heavy rains caused riverbanks to overflow, threatening towns and agriculture.

solutions.name: Emergency Evacuation and Relief
solutions.description: Mobilize resources to evacuate affected citizens and provide aid.

solutions.name: Build Flood Barriers
solutions.description: Invest in long-term infrastructure to prevent future floods.

solutions.name: Minimal Intervention
solutions.description: Only provide small-scale aid, hoping flood subsides naturally.

problem.name: Energy Price Surge due to Global Crisis
problem.description: International energy prices are rising, impacting domestic energy bills and inflation.

solutions.name: Subsidize Energy Prices
solutions.description: Provide temporary subsidies to citizens to reduce energy costs.

solutions.name: Encourage Renewable Energy
solutions.description: Invest in renewable infrastructure to reduce dependency on imports.

solutions.name: Do Nothing
solutions.description: Keep budget untouched, risk public dissatisfaction.

problem.name: Labor Shortage in Vysočina
problem.description: Key industries face worker shortages, slowing production and causing unrest among employers.

solutions.name: Offer Temporary Worker Incentives
solutions.description: Provide financial bonuses and benefits to attract workers.

solutions.name: Increase Automation
solutions.description: Invest in machinery and automation to compensate for labor shortages.

solutions.name: Do Nothing
solutions.description: Leave market to adjust naturally.

problem.name: Chemical Spill in Pardubický
problem.description: A chemical spill from a local plant threatens water supply and public health.

solutions.name: Immediate Clean-up and Evacuation
solutions.description: Deploy emergency teams to contain spill and protect citizens.

solutions.name: Provide Compensation to Affected Citizens
solutions.description: Give financial compensation to victims, but delay clean-up.

solutions.name: Minimal Action
solutions.description: Wait and assess damage, minimal intervention.

problem.name: Public Transport Strike in Brno
problem.description: Public transportation workers go on strike, disrupting daily commutes and local economy.

solutions.name: Negotiate Salary Increase
solutions.description: Reach agreement with unions for moderate salary increases.

solutions.name: Provide Temporary Incentives
solutions.description: Offer one-time bonuses to resolve strike quickly.

solutions.name: Maintain Hard Line
solutions.description: Refuse demands, hoping strike will end without concessions.

problem.name: Implement EU Green Deal Programs
problem.description: The EU introduces new sustainability programs. Your government must decide how aggressively to implement them nationwide.

solutions.name: Full Implementation
solutions.description: Adopt all programs immediately, invest in clean energy and transportation.

solutions.name: Phased Approach
solutions.description: Implement gradually to spread costs and monitor outcomes.

solutions.name: Minimal Compliance
solutions.description: Only fulfill mandatory requirements, avoiding large investments.

problem.name: Attracting Tech Startups to Brno
problem.description: Government wants to develop Brno as a tech hub. Policies must be chosen to attract innovation.

solutions.name: Tax Incentives and Grants
solutions.description: Offer generous incentives to attract foreign and local startups.

solutions.name: Develop Tech Parks
solutions.description: Invest in physical infrastructure like coworking and incubator spaces.

solutions.name: Focus on Regulations Only
solutions.description: Simplify bureaucracy but offer minimal financial support.

problem.name: Rising Tourism in Prague
problem.description: Tourist numbers are increasing rapidly, causing strain on transport and services but boosting the economy.

solutions.name: Invest in Public Transport and Services
solutions.description: Upgrade infrastructure to handle increased tourists and improve citizen comfort.

solutions.name: Limit Tourist Access
solutions.description: Introduce visitor caps or fees to protect residents and environment.

solutions.name: Do Nothing
solutions.description: Allow natural growth without interventions, risk overcrowding.

problem.name: Regional Rail Modernization in Ústecký
problem.description: The government can invest in upgrading the rail system to improve efficiency and connectivity.

solutions.name: Full Upgrade
solutions.description: Invest heavily in modernizing tracks, trains, and stations.

solutions.name: Partial Improvements
solutions.description: Upgrade only the most critical lines and stations.

solutions.name: Delay Projects
solutions.description: Keep budget for other needs, risk outdated infrastructure.

problem.name: EU Digital Tax Directive
problem.description: EU proposes a digital tax. You must decide the domestic approach to compliance and taxation of tech giants.

solutions.name: Aggressive Implementation
solutions.description: Apply high digital tax rates, increasing revenue but potentially upsetting businesses.

solutions.name: Moderate Compliance
solutions.description: Implement fair rates balancing revenue and business climate.

solutions.name: Minimal Compliance
solutions.description: Apply low rates, risking EU criticism.

problem.name: University Research Funding Strategy
problem.description: Decide the distribution of research grants to public universities, impacting innovation and long-term education quality.

solutions.name: Fund High-Impact Research Only
solutions.description: Allocate grants to projects with international recognition potential.

solutions.name: Distribute Equally
solutions.description: Spread grants fairly across universities regardless of impact.

solutions.name: Minimal Funding
solutions.description: Cut back grants to preserve budget for other programs.

problem.name: Hosting International Summit in Prague
problem.description: Opportunity to host a major EU summit. The decision impacts international prestige, costs, and citizen satisfaction.

solutions.name: Full Hosting Commitment
solutions.description: Spend heavily to host summit with maximum visibility and security.

solutions.name: Minimal Hosting
solutions.description: Host only essential meetings to reduce costs.

solutions.name: Decline Invitation
solutions.description: Refuse to host, saving budget but losing prestige.

problem.name: Urban Housing Development in Ostrava
problem.description: The city faces a housing shortage. Decisions affect budget, citizen satisfaction, and environment.

solutions.name: Build New Affordable Housing
solutions.description: Invest heavily in residential construction projects.

solutions.name: Encourage Private Developers
solutions.description: Provide incentives for private companies to build housing.

solutions.name: Do Nothing
solutions.description: Avoid immediate investment, risk public dissatisfaction.

problem.name: National AI Strategy
problem.description: Decide on funding and regulation for AI development, influencing economy and citizen perception over long term.

solutions.name: Invest Heavily in AI Research
solutions.description: Fund research centers, attract talent, and push AI innovation.

solutions.name: Moderate Investment
solutions.description: Support AI development gradually, monitor societal impact.

solutions.name: Minimal Support
solutions.description: Limited funding, prioritize budget for other sectors.

problem.name: Flood Protection in South Moravia
problem.description: Heavy rains predicted; need to protect agricultural land and citizens from flooding.

solutions.name: Build Temporary Levees
solutions.description: Rapidly deploy barriers to protect towns and farmland.

solutions.name: Evacuate Affected Areas
solutions.description: Focus on citizen safety, minimize infrastructure investment.

solutions.name: Do Minimal Action
solutions.description: Let water rise naturally, avoid costs but risk major damages.

name: Energy Grid Instability After EU Policy Change
description: The EU passes a sudden policy accelerating the phase-out of coal subsidies. The national energy grid becomes unstable due to rapid shifts toward renewables. Several regions report local outages.

solutions.name: Launch Emergency Stabilization Program
solutions.description: Allocate emergency funds to stabilize the energy grid and support rapid construction of backup power systems. This ensures immediate stability but significantly strains the budget.

solutions.name: Negotiate Temporary Exemptions with the EU
solutions.description: Lobby Brussels for a transition delay. This approach protects the energy grid short-term but risks EU criticism and public backlash from environmental groups.

solutions.name: Accelerate Renewable Integration
solutions.description: Push a rapid nationwide renewable expansion. This aligns with EU goals but causes short-term outages and lowered public satisfaction due to price spikes.

problem.name: Smart City Implementation in Prague
problem.description: EU offers funding for smart city technologies. Decide how extensively to modernize Prague’s infrastructure.

solutions.name: Full Smart City Upgrade
solutions.description: Implement full AI traffic management, energy monitoring, and smart services.

solutions.name: Partial Implementation
solutions.description: Introduce only major technologies in high-traffic districts.

solutions.name: Minimal Adoption
solutions.description: Invest only in pilot projects to test feasibility.

problem.name: International Energy Crisis
problem.description: Global energy prices spike. Decide how to respond to ensure stability and affordability.

solutions.name: Subsidize Energy Prices
solutions.description: Provide temporary subsidies to households and industries.

solutions.name: Promote Renewable Energy
solutions.description: Invest in renewable projects to reduce dependency on imports.

solutions.name: Do Minimal Intervention
solutions.description: Avoid large spending, risk higher citizen dissatisfaction.

problem.name: Regional Floodplain Restoration in South Bohemia
problem.description: EU funds are available to restore natural floodplains to prevent future floods.

solutions.name: Full Restoration
solutions.description: Restore all targeted floodplains for maximum ecological benefit.

solutions.name: Partial Restoration
solutions.description: Focus on high-risk areas only.

solutions.name: Delay Projects
solutions.description: Postpone investment to save budget, risk future damage.

problem.name: Labor Strike in Automotive Sector
problem.description: Workers in a major automotive plant threaten strike. Decide the government's intervention strategy.

solutions.name: Negotiate with Unions
solutions.description: Offer concessions to workers to prevent strike.

solutions.name: Maintain Firm Position
solutions.description: Do not negotiate, risk production halt.

solutions.name: Temporary Subsidy
solutions.description: Provide short-term financial aid to prevent strike.

problem.name: National Cybersecurity Upgrade
problem.description: Recent attacks on government infrastructure highlight vulnerabilities. Decide on investment in cyber defense.

solutions.name: Comprehensive Upgrade
solutions.description: Invest heavily in cyber infrastructure, training, and monitoring.

solutions.name: Partial Upgrade
solutions.description: Focus on critical systems only.

solutions.name: Minimal Action
solutions.description: Do not invest now, risk future attacks.

problem.name: Green Transport Initiative
problem.description: EU offers subsidies for promoting electric vehicles and bike lanes in urban centers.

solutions.name: Full Implementation
solutions.description: Upgrade infrastructure for EVs, expand bike lanes, and offer incentives.

solutions.name: Partial Implementation
solutions.description: Focus on selected districts with highest traffic.

solutions.name: Delay Program
solutions.description: Postpone investments, save budget but lose environmental momentum.

problem.name: Border Security Tensions
problem.description: An increase in illegal border crossings from neighboring countries triggers public concern.

solutions.name: Increase Border Patrols
solutions.description: Deploy additional security forces to secure the borders.

solutions.name: Diplomatic Approach
solutions.description: Negotiate with neighbors to manage migration collaboratively.

solutions.name: Minimal Intervention
solutions.description: Avoid large-scale action, risk public dissatisfaction.

problem.name: High-Tech Education Reform
problem.description: Introduce AI-driven education programs in selected regions to boost future workforce skills.

solutions.name: Nationwide Rollout
solutions.description: Implement AI programs in all schools immediately.

solutions.name: Pilot Program
solutions.description: Introduce AI in select schools to test effectiveness.

solutions.name: Delay Reform
solutions.description: Postpone adoption, conserve budget, risk lagging skills.

problem.name: Flood Alert in Moravia
problem.description: Heavy rains threaten several towns; regional measures are required.

solutions.name: Immediate Evacuation & Aid
solutions.description: Deploy emergency services and relocate residents at risk.

solutions.name: Partial Measures
solutions.description: Focus on the most vulnerable towns only.

solutions.name: Wait & Monitor
solutions.description: Take no immediate action, risk disaster.

problem.name: National AI Regulation Debate
problem.description: EU proposes strict AI regulations. Decide national stance and implementation.

solutions.name: Full Compliance with EU
solutions.description: Adopt all proposed regulations strictly, ensuring EU alignment.

solutions.name: Moderate Adoption
solutions.description: Implement key regulations, but leave some flexibility for innovation.

solutions.name: Reject Strict Rules
solutions.description: Delay adoption, prioritize national flexibility.
